title: Yarlung 3 Pack Imitation Rattan Woven Bread Baskets, 30cm Poly Wicker Fruit Baskets for Food Serving, Display, Vegetables, Home Kitchen, Restaurant, Outdoor, Brown Rectangular
features: Include 3 pack poly wicker bread baskets, measure 30cm x 19.8cm x 10cm. Brown color gives a touch of nature and fit well for any room decor.
The basket is constructed of durable hand woven polypropylene fibers in delicate and uniform textures, excellent for displaying.
Giving no hard jagged edges, the fruit basket is reinforced at the rim and based with internal wire ribs, the smooth belt protects your hand from hurting.
Our display basket is healthy for containing breads, candies, crackers, fruit, vegetables, snacks, food serving and storage, also used as a dish for keys, wallet, phone and etc.
The food serving baskets are perfectly suited for placing at home kitchen, dining table, office, fruit store, supermarket, fine restaurants, outdoor picnics and more.
description: Product Description Size: 30cm x 19.8cm x 10cm Polypropylene Plastic Material Home Helper -- Make Your Room Cleaner As for fruits and snack, they can be placed in the living room coffee table. As for vegetable bread, they can be placed in the kitchen table. As for bathroom classification,they can be used for towels, clothes induction. As for book sorting, they can be easy to organize and summarize books.
